title: Rotarod test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fobdv","text":"Protocol to evaluate motor coordination of rats by using the rotarod test ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"f8f5u","text":"All procedures were carried out following the guidelines on the ethical use of animals from the Council Directive of the European Communities (2010/63/EU) and were approved by the Italian Ministry of Health ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Accustom the rat with the rod rotating at low speed (4 rpm) for at least 30 seconds

Perform the rotarod test, consisting in three sessions performed onthree consecutive days; each session consists of three trials with anaccelerating rod from 4 to 40 rpm in 300 s, and at least 5 min of rest between trials.
Record the time in which the rat fall from the rod for each trial toobtain daily average values.
creator: Ada Ledonne
